en: ’Apʉʉ, are you home?
Yes, come on in.
Aruuai, are you home?

ab: ku a salia ’Apʉʉ! Aruuai aku, marui ta’iara? macu puaili ’Apʉʉ kihlamuhlamu aku.
ch: B:’Apʉʉ不在家耶!我是Aruuai，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告’Apʉʉ。
en: Apʉʉ is not at home. I am Aruuai. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.
Who are you?

ab: tamu ahlaina, ihlahlamu ia ’Apʉʉ nua Aruuai, tumalʉlʉvʉ amu marupangʉhlʉvʉ sipangʉhlʉva!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是’Apʉʉ和Aruuai，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are ’Apʉʉ and Aruuai, please open the door for us.
Who is it?
I am ’Avi, I am here for Pa’ʉ.

ab: tamu ahlaina, mʉcʉkʉhlʉ cu aku kimita ihlau.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: rahlua cu kuacʉkʉhlʉ ihlau, tam miatatarʉ aku ihlau.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Hlatingai mʉcʉkʉhlʉ cu aku ukikirimi ihlau pasaulaula’ʉ.
en: Hlatingai, I am here to play with you.

ab: pasakulai puaruma, rahlua ku upapalu ihlau.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!
The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: muara! hlilʉmʉkʉ ku masukiu’una kani’i, kuatahlamʉ.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.
The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: tuapurukia! kuatahlamʉ hlilʉmʉkʉ ku viaruna kupisavuanʉ!
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: u! tam maami a viaru kani’i.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.
Do you want some oranges?

ab: kutuahlʉ aku uumu vaakʉ, uumu aku ’asupi.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: tumua u i uumu kamusia hliparanganʉa?
en: Would you want some cookies?
Sure, I like it very much.

ab: akulici ku masukiu’u uvura ihlau uumu.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.
Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: umala ku sahlumu uvura ihlau miima.
en: I will bring you some water.
Thank you.

ab: kuatumuhlukia, hlivavu cu ku tam tumuhlu camai.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.
Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.
I’ll make myself at home then.
Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: kuatumuhlu cu aku, kutuahlʉ cu ku uumu.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
